commands.author: jason-allen-oneal
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c76768736c7ed897afa330cc933c055435da7ccc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a per-agent SQLite `qmd_session_export_cache` table, a QMD session-export stat/fingerprint fast path, QMD-specific plugin SDK cache helpers, generated API/schema updates, and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +272, Tests +162, Generated +35. Total +469 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect from source inspection: a cache row keyed to the current export directory with matching stat/fingerprint but an existing outside `target` will pass `fs.access(cached.target)` and continue before deriving the expected target. I did not run a synthetic DB-mutation reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can validate cached targets and add the missing regression test; final merge still needs conflict resolution and maintainer acceptance of the schema/fingerprint tradeoffs.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
